title: WindChime Unofficial Continued
description:
Gentle chime that sway in the wind.   
 A port of the mod Windchimes to newer version.
body:
## About
**A continuation of the popular fabric mod** [WindChimes](https://modrinth.com/mod/windchimes).  
This mod aims to port it to newer 1.21.1 , 1.21.4 - 1.21.10 versions, as well as adding more deco features.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c9c676813a12195086daeaaa4de17b8cdbe1649.png)

- Bamboo chime can be placed either on celing or on walls.  

![Chimes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e13e54e14576eec2779a54d61aaddb7c73ba08fd.png)

- The new version introduces the dreamcatcher  
(The original mod author once mentioned  adding this into the game, so I did this.)

![Dreamcatcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd7801b2b0a9f0f07f430241e6e60985fb4c6519.png)

- There're 6 types in game: oak(default), spruce, birch, dark oak, acacia, jungle

![Dreamcatcher with different types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3a5efc6f7993a865ac98a8358c2659d165f4c54.png)

- The combination can create many fascinating visual decoration effects!

![Decorative](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bcba601be81696f751ff91ab1358152c81c34c3.png)

- Transform their texture by using the corresponding log blocks.

![Transform](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c9d049f0c055a76d992dd3ec56abc1cdf36c863.png)

- The transformed dreamcatcher will save its data when broken.

![Data saved](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae047bd821ba3a672413c5c8fac0cf9cc11fedb8.png)

- **The dreamcatcher has some unique features. Try to place a dreamcatcher beside your bed (Effective in 3-4 blocks).Trust me, sweet dreams will come to your mind while sleeping. By doing this, your health bar will recover to full state with a good rest.(Test)Moreover, if you hold a totem of undying in your main hand, a total of 650 exp will be earned, in exchange for your totem.**

- For survival crafting, the recipe format is as follows  
(Take iron chime as an example)  
(In 1.3.0 the button needs to be replaced with oak planks):

![Take iron chime as an example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e595c3b8659274dfee7dbe24a7101180707acc7e.png)

- The recipe for dreamcatcher:

![dreamcatcher recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1907c652e7b106c4c01b7c2f076f6f9e8f912505.png)
